stops.name: Kyoto Samurai Experience
stops.notes: A strong match for the 'traditional culture' vibe, offering an authentic indoor experience that is unaffected by the expected occasional rain. | Tags: Classes & Workshops, Activities | ⭐ 5.0/5 (1,437 reviews)

stops.name: Kyoto Imperial Palace
stops.address: 3 Kyoto-Gyoen, Kamigyo-Ku Kyoto Gyoen, Kyoto 602-0881 Kyoto Prefecture
stops.notes: A strong match for 'traditional culture', 'nature', and 'zen', with beautiful gardens ideal for spring. It's budget-friendly, though occasional rain might slightly impact enjoyment of the outdoor grounds. | Tags: Sights & Landmarks, Attractions | ⭐ 4.1/5 (2,504 reviews)

stops.name: Kyoto Free Walking Tour
stops.address: Kawabatacho, Higashiyama-Ku In front of the Izumo no Okuni Statue, Kyoto 605-0076 Kyoto Prefecture
stops.notes: Excellent for a 'budget' traveler and likely covers desired 'temples' and 'traditional culture'. However, it's an entirely outdoor activity that would be significantly impacted by the expected occasional rain. | Tags: Tours, Activities | ⭐ 4.9/5 (1,037 reviews)

stops.name: Cycle Kyoto
stops.address: 7 Higashikujo Nishisannocho, Minami-ku, Kyoto 601-8003 Kyoto Prefecture
stops.notes: Outdoor activity, which will be impacted by occasional rain. While it can offer views of nature and traditional areas, it doesn't directly align with the core 'temples, zen' vibe. | Tags: Tours, Activities, Outdoor Activities | ⭐ 4.9/5 (2,039 reviews)
